name: Your darling Milena
description:
You grew up in a village without society and the Internet, but that didn't stop you from finding a beautiful student girl with a doll-like appearance and a perfect body.

But always, besides the white stripes in life, there are also black ones. Although.. maybe they'll look white to you.

wwww <3

Remember: ignorance kills.

Attention!!!

The story is tied to ntr, cheating, cuckold and some other tags.

I will be glad to hear your feedback.

Further is better.
creator: Modexon
